7.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:L/UI:P/VC:H/VI:L/VA:L/SC:H/SI:H/SA:L"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "Any authenticated user can inject arbitrary HTML via updating their account's font family.

### Impact
Cross-site scripting.
The injected payload will be reflected in every MantisBT page.

Leveraging another vulnerability (CSP bypass, see [GHSA-9c3j-xm6v-j7j3](https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt/security/advisories/GHSA-9c3j-xm6v-j7j3)), the attacker could achieve account takeover.

### Patches
- 9e8409cdd979eba86ef532756fc47c1d8112d22d

### Workarounds
None

### Credits
Thanks to siunam (Tang Cheuk Hei) for discovering and responsibly reporting the issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00424, "percentile": 0.33834}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-j3v9-553h-x28j", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-11T19:34:38Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j3v9-553h-x28j", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-j3v9-553h-x28j"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40596"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-22T20:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-05-11T19:34:38Z", "references": ["https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt/security/advisories/GHSA-9c3j-xm6v-j7j3", "https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt/security/advisories/GHSA-j3v9-553h-x28j", "https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt/commit/9e8409cdd979eba86ef532756fc47c1d8112d22d", "https://mantisbt.org/bugs/view.php?id=37011", "https://mantisbt.org/bugs/view.php?id=37016", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40596", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j3v9-553h-x28j"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/mantisbt/mantisbt/security-advisories/GHSA-j3v9-553h-x28j", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt", "summary": "MantisBT is Vulnerable to XSS leading to account takeover via updating a user's font family preference", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T23:20:18Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-j3v9-553h-x28j", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.28.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "mantisbt/mantisbt"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.11.0, <= 2.28.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: MantisBT is Vulnerable to XSS leading to account takeover via updating a user's font family preference
